channel.title: Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz
channel.description: Recent content on Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, my name is Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz. I am a last year Medical Student, passionate about medical image analysis, statistics and global health advocacy. I am part of Ueffing Lab at the University of Tübingen where I am focusing my research on retina analysis. My research interests focus on medical images analysis, retina image analysis . Enjoying sharing my skills with others, I am teaching assistant for several courses in statistics.

item.title: Advocacy
item.description: IFMSA The (IFMSA): is the oldest and largest youth led organisations worldwide, representing 1,3 million medical studnets in x countris in x National member organisations: Delegation 1 ÖH I am also instructor for the following university certificates, as part of UCLouvain’s technology platform for Statistical Methodology and Computing Service (SMCS): 1 2 Austrian Medical Students Union I am or have been active at AMSA adovacting for all medical students in Austria (25.

item.title: Code
item.description: Below you will find various projects sorted by programming language or skill. Web development German Cardiac Arrest registry G-CAR 2022 abc Austrian Students Union at the Sigmund Freud University ViennaÖH SFU 2018 abc Website of the Medical Student Association from ÖH SFU stvmed 2018 abc AMSA AMSA-Austria 2020 abc Fachschaft Medizin TübingenFSMED 2016 abc Feel free to contact me if you need help in building your own website. GitHub See more projects I am working on at GitHub .

item.title: Contact
item.description: I am available for any inqueries on LinkedIn linkedin.com/in/dzvm. For anything else, send me an email to get in touch.

item.title: CV
item.description: Summary abc See my current CV at LinkedIn. Education (2020 – Present) Master in Medical Sciences – SFU Vienna, Austria Thesis: abc (supervisors: abc) See all publications, posters and talks (2018 – 2020) Bachelor in Medical Sciences – SFU Vienna, Austria Thesis: abc (supervisor: abc) (2015 – 2018) Medicine – University of Tübingen, Germany Faculty exchange of one semester at University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, USA (2014) Medicine – University of Dresden, Germany Faculty exchange of one semester at University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign, USA (2013) BSc in economics & management sciences – ZU Friedrichshafen, Germany Experience (2017 – Present) abc – SFU Vienna, Austria See all courses Certificates Immediate Life Support Technical skills & languages Software Python Matlab Languages German (native) English (fluent) Spanish (intermediate) Chinese (basic) Download CV

item.title: Research
item.description: My research interests focus on medical image analysis. My Doctoral thesis is under supervision of Prof. Marius Ueffing and Johannes Dietter. As I am involved within different Student organisations I am also active in Public Health Research and advocacy Publications Blom, Iris Martine, L. Campos, Mohamed El Amine Youcef Ali, Muhammad Mikail Athif Zhafir Asyura, Daniel Zeymer von Metnitz, Bernice Limann, Eglė Janušonytė. (July 28, 2021). Youth versus pandemics: the role of future generations in the pandemic treaty THE LANCET Global Health.

item.title: Sitemap
item.description: Below, a list of all the pages available on the site (in alphabetical order). If you cannot find what you are looking for, do not hesitate to contact me. For you robots out there is an XML version available for digesting as well. Pages About Contact CV Homepage Research Sitemap Code Teaching Terms and policies

item.title: Teaching
item.description: Teaching assistant positions I am or have been teaching assistant for the following courses: 2022 - Present: Statistics and data sciences (B1c, B1e) at the Center for Bioinformatics at (SFU Vienna) Workshops & trainings I am also a trainer within the International Medical Students Associtions (IFMSA): IFMSA TNT Training New Trainers 2022 IFMSA Public Relations, Advocacy and Communication Training I have also facilitating trainings within the Austrian Medical Students Association (AMSA):

item.title: Terms & policies
item.description: This is my personal website written and edited by me. Your use of this website, in any and all forms, constitutes an acceptance of these terms and policies. This page is reviewed and revised from time to time. All content provided is for informational purposes only. The articles and posts on this website are my own and do not necessarily represent the positions, strategies, or opinions of my employer or its subsidiaries.
